title: What to do if you freak out from loss of work or whatever

transcript.text: Hello. This is another thought I've been having and it's, um, what should we do if everybody starts to freak out? Uh, I think I've, you know, heard like George Nury say and I think some other people say that like a lot of people are freaking out now, like not having fun, like not being happy because of the economic problems and other stuff like this.

And, uh, so anyways, like I'm, I'm not freaking out right now. I'm doing okay. Um, but like if I were to start freaking out and see everybody start freaking out and not being happy for whatever reason, I think, uh, my prescription, if I was the doctor, I would say that everybody should lighten up. Like, uh, you know, just look at the bright side of things.

Like all the technology we have and communication is really cool. And there's lots of ways we can spend our time and keep ourselves occupied. So just like, just like lighten up and change, just totally change the way you live your life. Like change, just let go of all of the, uh, things that hold you back.

Like, like, you know, like get rid of fear. And I guess fear would be its own video, but like, just like be more open-minded and just do stuff that you never would have done before. For example, upload videos to YouTube. I'm crazy. He's talking about crazy stuff or whatever, you know, venting and stuff on YouTube.

Cause it's kind of fun to do that. Cause like sometimes people, you know, people rate you and sometimes, and then more people have subscribed to you. And sometimes people comment on your videos and it's just kind of, it's interesting. It's a fun, it's a fun little extra thing to do that doesn't talk, take a lot of time and costs any money. Um,

Um, and, uh, there's, you know, other stuff you can do, I guess too, that's totally different, you know, free, like, um, well, there's lots of stuff that's free, you know, like if you're out of job, you can start to work out, you know, do yoga or lots of stuff that's, that's, that's, uh, that's free.

So, uh, that's, uh, basically what I would do. I like to listen to, uh, interviews and stuff, interesting, uh, stuff I get off of YouTube. I record it and then listen to it. And that's a cool thing to do. If you have insomnia, your stress can cause insomnia and then you just listen to those things and then you can stay up all night listening to cool stuff while you're laying there. So there you go.
